Mod Uploader (1.4.3)
By: Digitalroot

Description:
  Uploads mods to NexusMods

Usage:
  Digitalroot.ModUploader [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  nexusmods, nx  nexusmods.com commands.


Based on work by the original author Alistair Chapman aka agc93 (https://github.com/agc93).
View original @ https://github.com/agc93/nexus-uploader, MIT License.
Contributors:
	focustense (https://github.com/focustense).
	Timothy Baldridge aka halgari (https://github.com/halgari).
	Digitalroot (https://github.com/Digitalroot).

Mod Uploader (1.4.3)
By: Digitalroot

Description:
  nexusmods.com commands.

Usage:
  Digitalroot.ModUploader nexusmods [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  check                           Check that an API Key and Cookie are valid.
  upload <mod-id> <archive-file>  Upload a file of 20.0GB or less to 
                                  nexusmods.com


Based on work by the original author Alistair Chapman aka agc93 (https://github.com/agc93).

Mod Uploader (1.4.3)
By: Digitalroot

Description:
  Check that an API Key and Cookie are valid.

Usage:
  Digitalroot.ModUploader nexusmods check [options]

Options:
  -k, --key <key>                     Api Key, ENV: NEXUSMOD_API_KEY
  -nmsc, --nexusmods_session_cookie   Session Cookie, ENV: 
  <nexusmods_session_cookie>          NEXUSMOD_SESSION_COOKIE
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information


Based on work by the original author Alistair Chapman aka agc93 (https://github.com/agc93).

Mod Uploader (1.4.3)
By: Digitalroot

Description:
  Upload a file of 20.0GB or less to nexusmods.com

Usage:
  Digitalroot.ModUploader nexusmods upload [<mod-id> <archive-file>] [options]

Arguments:
  <mod-id>        Nexus mod id.
  <archive-file>  File to upload.

Options:
  -f, --file-name <file-name> (REQUIRED)  Name for the file on Nexus Mods
  -v, --version <version> (REQUIRED)      Version for your uploaded file.
  -t, --category                          Mod file category [default: Main]
  <Archived|Main|Misc|Old|Optional|Updat
  es> (REQUIRED)
  -d, --description <description>         Description
  -g, --game <game>                       Game mod is for. [default: valheim]
  -dmfu, --disable-main-file-update       Skips replacing an existing file in 
                                          the 'Main' category with the new one. 
                                          [default: False]
  -dfa, --disable-file-archive            Skips archiving older versions of the 
                                          existing file. [default: False]
  -ddwm, --disable-download-with-manager  Removes the 'Download With Manager' 
                                          button. [default: False]
  -dvu, --disable-version-update          Skips updating mod's main version to 
                                          match this file's version. [default: 
                                          False]
  -dmv, --disable-main-vortex             Skips setting file as the main Vortex 
                                          file. [default: False]
  -drpu, --disable-requirements-pop-up    Skips informing downloaders of this 
                                          mod's requirements before they 
                                          attempt to download this file 
                                          [default: False]
  -k, --key <key>                         Api Key, ENV: NEXUSMOD_API_KEY
  -nmsc, --nexusmods_session_cookie       Session Cookie, ENV: 
  <nexusmods_session_cookie>              NEXUSMOD_SESSION_COOKIE
  -?, -h, --help                          Show help and usage information


Based on work by the original author Alistair Chapman aka agc93 (https://github.com/agc93).
View original @ https://github.com/agc93/nexus-uploader, MIT License.
Contributors:
	focustense (https://github.com/focustense).
	Timothy Baldridge aka halgari (https://github.com/halgari).
	Digitalroot (https://github.com/Digitalroot).

Mod Uploader created by Digitalroot of the Valhalla Legends Team.
Released under the MIT License.
Support Me @ https://www.buymeacoffee.com/digitalroot.
Join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/SsMW3rm67u.

Mod Uploader (1.4.3)
By: Digitalroot

Description:
  Upload a file of 20.0GB or less to nexusmods.com

Usage:
  Digitalroot.ModUploader nexusmods upload [<mod-id> <archive-file>] [options]

Arguments:
  <mod-id>        Nexus mod id.
  <archive-file>  File to upload.

Options:
  -f, --file-name <file-name> (REQUIRED)  Name for the file on Nexus Mods
  -v, --version <version> (REQUIRED)      Version for your uploaded file.
  -t, --category                          Mod file category [default: Main]
  <Archived|Main|Misc|Old|Optional|Updat
  es> (REQUIRED)
  -d, --description <description>         Description
  -g, --game <game>                       Game mod is for. [default: valheim]
  -dmfu, --disable-main-file-update       Skips replacing an existing file in 
                                          the 'Main' category with the new one. 
                                          [default: False]
  -dfa, --disable-file-archive            Skips archiving older versions of the 
                                          existing file. [default: False]
  -ddwm, --disable-download-with-manager  Removes the 'Download With Manager' 
                                          button. [default: False]
  -dvu, --disable-version-update          Skips updating mod's main version to 
                                          match this file's version. [default: 
                                          False]
  -dmv, --disable-main-vortex             Skips setting file as the main Vortex 
                                          file. [default: False]
  -drpu, --disable-requirements-pop-up    Skips informing downloaders of this 
                                          mod's requirements before they 
                                          attempt to download this file 
                                          [default: False]
  -k, --key <key>                         Api Key, ENV: NEXUSMOD_API_KEY
  -nmsc, --nexusmods_session_cookie       Session Cookie, ENV: 
  <nexusmods_session_cookie>              NEXUSMOD_SESSION_COOKIE
  -?, -h, --help                          Show help and usage information


Based on work by the original author Alistair Chapman aka agc93 (https://github.com/agc93).
View original @ https://github.com/agc93/nexus-uploader, MIT License.
Contributors:
	focustense (https://github.com/focustense).
	Timothy Baldridge aka halgari (https://github.com/halgari).
	Digitalroot (https://github.com/Digitalroot).

Mod Uploader created by Digitalroot of the Valhalla Legends Team.
Released under the MIT License.
Support Me @ https://www.buymeacoffee.com/digitalroot.
Join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/SsMW3rm67u.
